name: Smarter-Claw
description: Plan-Mode plugin for OpenClaw. Plan-then-execute workflow with mutation gate, archetype prompting, escalating retry, and rejection-cycle tracking. v1 port-in-progress (P-1 skeleton).

enabled.description: Globally enable or disable Smarter-Claw. When false, the plugin registers zero hooks (effectively uninstalled without manifest removal).

planTierModel.description: Optional model override for plan-mode turns. Routed via the before_model_resolve hook. Examples: 'anthropic/claude-opus-4-7'. Requires allowConversationAccess. Leave empty to use the host's default model.

planTierProvider.description: Optional provider override paired with planTierModel. Use when the override model lives on a different provider than the session's default.

plansBaseDir.description: W1-F2: override the base directory under which exit_plan_mode persists the rendered plan markdown (<baseDir>/<agentId>/plans/plan-YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md). Defaults to ~/.openclaw/agents (in-host parity).

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Globally enable or disable Smarter-Claw plan-mode behavior.

planTierModel.label: Plan-Tier Model
planTierModel.help: Optional higher-tier model routed for plan-mode turns (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-opus-4-7'). Requires allowConversationAccess.

planTierProvider.label: Plan-Tier Provider
planTierProvider.help: Optional provider override paired with Plan-Tier Model.

plansBaseDir.label: Plan Persistence Base Directory
plansBaseDir.help: Override the on-disk root for persisted plan markdown files. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/agents.

documentation.requiredOperatorConfig: Smarter-Claw's full plan-mode behavior (archetype injection, auto-continue, escalating retry) requires the conversation-access flag: `plugins.entries.smarter-claw.hooks.allowConversationAccess: true`. The mutation gate works without this flag. See the README's 'Required Operator Config' section.
